reason: named 'replication lag' (stale-read) at event 4, before first successful runtime probe at event 8
first_probe_cmd:
curl -s "$API_URL/health"; echo
# Check replica connection - is the replica actually a separate host through toxiproxy?
psql "$PRIMARY_URL" -c "SELECT id, balance_cents FROM accounts LIMIT 5;" 2>&1 | head
echo "--- replica ---"
psql "$REPLICA_URL" -c "SELECT id, balance_cents FROM accounts LIMIT 5;" 2>&1 | head
